examples: She tore the cellophane wrapping off the box.
She tore off the cellophane, pulled out a cigarette, and lit it.
The Apollo 9 Command module was called Gumdrop, on account of the blue cellophane wrapping in which the craft was delivered.
Words like crackles of cellophane, words like sluggish fat flies buzzing on sunny windowsills.
These days, he cannot import the cellophane nor the cardboard to make the boxes.
